name: wxcode-admin-estate-realty
title: Estate Realty Admin
description: Real-estate brokerage back-office admin — light mode, teal accent, left sidebar with brokerage switcher, 4 KPI cards (active listings, deals in progress, avg days on market, commission MTD), listings table, deals pipeline, and agent leaderboard.

query.en: Build me a real-estate brokerage back-office admin dashboard — left sidebar with office switcher, topbar with region filter, 4 KPI cards (active listings, deals in progress, avg days on market, commission MTD), a listings table, a deals pipeline, and an agent leaderboard.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a real-estate brokerage back-office admin dashboard — left sidebar with office switcher, topbar with region filter, 4 KPI cards (active listings, deals in progress, avg days on market, commission MTD), a listings table, a deals pipeline, and an agent leaderboard.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
